intended_use: Saige-Density is intended for use with compatible full-field digital mammography (FFDM) and digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) systems. Saige-Density provides an ACR BI-RADS Atlas 5th Edition breast d
intended_use_full: Saige-Density is intended for use with compatible full-field digital mammography (FFDM) and digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) systems. Saige-Density provides an ACR BI-RADS Atlas 5th Edition breast density category to aid interpreting physicians in the assessment of breast tissue composition. Saige-Density produces adjunctive information. It is not a diagnostic aid.
ground_truth: Consensus of five expert radiologists' breast density categories (median of reported categories for each case) according to ACR BI-RADS 5th Edition guidelines
other_metrics: Four-class accuracy 81.28% (95% CI: 78.42, 83.84); Two-class categorization results reported in confusion matrix
